{
  "verdict": "reject",
  "preserved": [
    "Backend list and artifact routes functionality",
    "Dark monitor UI base theme"
  ],
  "regressions": [
    "Top filter buttons: Two buttons do not fire events (functional regression)",
    "Top filter buttons: Colors muted and look disabled (visual regression against 'readable and not disabled-looking' requirement)",
    "Font stack changed (deviation from accepted prototype)",
    "Added extra gradient cards (scope creep/deviation from accepted design)"
  ],
  "required_fixes": [
    "Restore event listeners for all top filter buttons",
    "Adjust inactive button colors to ensure readability and avoid disabled appearance",
    "Ensure active buttons use bright primary/white treatment with strong contrast",
    "Revert font stack to match the selected prototype",
    "Remove extra gradient cards not present in the accepted design"
  ],
  "tests_to_run": [
    "Unit test: Verify click events fire for all top filter buttons",
    "Visual regression test: Compare button states (active/inactive) against prototype contrast requirements",
    "Visual regression test: Verify font stack matches prototype",
    "Integration test: Confirm backend list and artifact routes still function correctly after UI fixes",
    "UI audit: Verify absence of unapproved gradient cards"
  ]
}
